name: Shadow Blade
description: The blade of a fallen king, it allows you to move unseen and strike from the shadows.

abilities.name: Shadow Walk
abilities.description: The wielder becomes invisible and gains a movement speed bonus. Grants phase movement while invisible. Cooldown: 25. Mana Cost: 75. Move Speed Bonus: 20%. Duration: 17. Attack Damage Bonus: 175. The attack breaking invisibility deals physical attack damage bonus with the attack.
